pages.title: Jewel Link
pages.description:
Match colorful jewels by aligning identical pieces to clear the board and earn points in this puzzle game. Players focus on connecting gem chains through strategic swapping and pattern recognition, aiming to optimize each move before time runs out. Levels gradually introduce unique gem types and obstacles, adding complexity to the standard jewel matching formula.

Key Features

• Chain matching core mechanic  
• Strategic jewel swapping controls  
• Timed level progression challenge  
• Varied gem types and obstacles  
• Casual puzzle gameplay style

• drag-and-drop gem controls  
• progressive level difficulty curves  
• combo chain scoring system  
• vibrant jewel-themed visuals

Progressive levels challenge players with increasingly complex layouts, encouraging thoughtful planning and quick decision-making.
